source.caption: Épure E 103 : pentagone D C B A S en double projection, diagonale D–A en trait fort, rabattu en vraie grandeur autour d'une frontale du plan passant par A (charnière ch).

notes: Rotated plate (rotation 90); read in the raw inspect-epure frame — ligne de terre horizontal (ch^V/p^V line, y≈306), recall lines vertical. Reconstructor is orientation-agnostic.
Charnière = frontale du plan passant par A (fixe): V-proj le long de la LT par A^V(212,298)→ch^V(568,298), H-proj par A^H→ch^H. hingeKind=frontal, rabattu dessiné dans la zone V (^V_R).

Rabattu vertices read at the ends of the drawn solid edges: A_R=A^V (on charnière, fixed), D_R via the D–A diagonal, B_R via edge B–A, C_R via edge D–C. S_R is not separately drawn, so it is omitted from the gold set.

Genuine plate slop, confirmed against exact SVG path coords: the two pentagon projections are sheared ~15px horizontally (recall-mismatch, cannot be zeroed by any single ground line — the drawn recall lines are not parallel) and the lifted pentagon is ~15px from coplanar. A mild ground-line tilt (306→294) balances recall (~15px) against coplanarity (~17px). Gold rabattu residual stays well under tolerance.
